## The compass

- [ ] Preserves autonomy (no new forced confirmations)
- [ ] Works 24/7 without a human in the loop

- [ ] `pnpm -r run build` passes
- [ ] Smoke test updated / added (`/tmp/test-<feature>.mjs`)
- [ ] Relevant doc updated (`docs/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry
